prompt: A photograph capturing the reflection of a South Asian woman with wet, dark hair looking into a marble bathroom mirror. She is wrapped in a white terry cloth bath towel and wears a gold and black mangalsutra necklace and red bangles on her left wrist. Her left hand is raised, holding a whole green cucumber near her temple, while her right hand is lifting and adjusting her hair. The background shows a well-lit, luxury hotel bathroom with a glass shower enclosure and a rain showerhead. The reflection is sharp and clear."
